name: Labsman
description: "Randomly flies above, then flies down to a random player, firing multiple rockets at them."
detail1: - After 2 - 3 seconds, Sword will face towards the nearest player creating a line. It will lunge following this line instantly killing on contact
detail2: - Killbot can only spawn after level 5
detail3: - Killbot has a limit of 3 permanant Killbots, and has no temporary cap.
